hero.subtitle: The Only Tracking App You'll Ever Need
hero.heading: Track Your Progress
hero.description: Track everything from gym workouts to outdoor activities and personal goals. {{appName}} helps you stay organized and motivated — your progress, your way.

phone.heading: Just Your Phone. That's It.
phone.description: No extra devices, no additional apps. {{appName}} uses your phone's built-in sensors to track everything — GPS, steps, motion, and more. Install and start tracking in seconds.
phone.sync: All your data is securely stored in the cloud and synced between the mobile app and web. Switch devices, never lose your progress.

simplicity.heading: Built for Simplicity
simplicity.description: Intuitive design that gets out of your way. Focus on what matters — your progress.
simplicity.intuitiveDesc: Your sessions organize themselves as you go. Pin favorites to the top for quick access
simplicity.navigationDesc: Swipe between pages, tap to explore — everything flows naturally
simplicity.editDesc: Everything you create is fully editable afterwards. Auto-save keeps your changes safe as you go
simplicity.allInOneDesc: Gym, activities, notes, habits, chat, and more — all in a single app

activities.heading: Track Every Activity
activities.description: From runs to rides, hikes to gym sessions — {{appName}} tracks it all with precision.
activities.gpsDesc: Real-time tracking with interactive maps and route visualization
activities.statsDesc: Distance, pace, calories, steps, moving time, duration — all tracked automatically
activities.templatesDesc: Save favorite routes and workouts, review your complete session history
activities.shareDesc: Create beautiful, fully customizable images of your sessions and share them with friends

analytics.heading: Powerful Analytics
analytics.description: See your progress, hit your goals. Detailed insights across all your activities.
analytics.chartsDesc: Visualize your improvement over days, weeks, months, and years
analytics.recordsDesc: Automatically track your PRs and celebrate milestones
analytics.reportsDesc: Generate weekly, monthly, and quarterly summaries of all your data
analytics.goalsDesc: Set personal goals and track your progress toward achieving them

social.heading: Share Your Journey
social.description: Connect with friends, share your sessions, and celebrate achievements together.
social.shareDesc: Post your workouts and activities to the social feed for friends to see
social.likeDesc: Engage with your friends' achievements and keep each other motivated
social.friendsDesc: Connect with friends and follow each other's fitness progress
social.feedDesc: See what your friends are up to with a real-time activity feed

chat.heading: Stay Connected
chat.description: Full-featured chat built right in. Share your progress without leaving the app.
chat.messagesDesc: Instant messaging with typing indicators and delivery status
chat.mediaDesc: Share photos and videos directly in your conversations
chat.voiceDesc: Record and send voice messages when typing isn't enough
chat.shareSessionsDesc: Send workout and activity summaries directly to friends

reminders.heading: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Reminders built into every feature. Stay on track with your habits, activities, and goals.
reminders.globalDesc: Set a global reminder and get notified on every device — mobile and web, always in sync
reminders.localDesc: Keep it simple with reminders that only fire on the device you set them on
reminders.priorityDesc: Important reminders break through with full-screen alerts that demand your attention
reminders.integratedDesc: Get reminded to complete habits, receive milestone alerts during activities, and more

notifications.heading: Never Miss a Moment
notifications.description: Live push notifications keep you in the loop. Friend requests, new comments, messages — delivered instantly to your device.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Tracking?
cta.description: Join {{appName}} and take control of your fitness journey today.

navbar.loginNote: Same account works on mobile & web
